positive: A vibrant, ethereal bioluminescent forest scene, dominated by giant, glowing flora and ancient, stylized trees. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and centered, featuring clean, strong silhouettes against a deep midnight blue and indigo sky. Glowing elements include geometric crystalline structures, floating nebula motes, and branching neon light streams. The art style is a blend of clean vector graphics and detailed botanical etching, maintaining high contrast and a flat, sophisticated aesthetic. Studio quality, suitable for textile printing, highly detailed, intricate linework.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, oversaturated, low contrast, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, messy, low detail, poorly drawn, photorealism, human figures
